function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap and nested AGENTS/workflow guidance. Used inbox-email header as canonical metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, and avoided guessing recipient/authority for finance-related outbound work.
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md` requests 'oldest 2 invoices linked to the founder I talk product with.' In canonical cast records, examined candidates (`10_entities/cast/nina.md`, `10_entities/cast/jana.md`) and scanned relationship fields across cast; none provides a founder role, so the referenced person is not uniquely resolvable. Per workflow rules in `99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md` and `99_system/workflows/sending-email.md`, ambiguous identity/finance authority requires clarification rather than guessing.
